testcase.name: testNewUserRegistrationRedirectsToDashboard
testcase.system-out:
======================================== TestLoginBehaviour — START ========================================
>> [Test 1] New user registration → redirect to dashboard Submitting sign-up form... PASS: Redirected to dashboard after registration.
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 146.0.7680.165 (resolved driver for Chrome 146) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/mayankjha/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac-arm64/146.0.7680.165/chromedriver Apr 05, 2026 7:52:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Apr 05, 2026 7:52:17 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.178. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.21.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: testLogoutClearsSessionAndRedirectsToLogin

testcase.system-out: >> [Test 2] Logout → session cleared → login page shown

testcase.name: testValidCredentialsRedirectsToDashboard
testcase.system-out: >> [Test 3] Valid credentials → redirect to dashboard PASS: Valid credentials accepted, on dashboard.

testcase.name: testSessionPersistsAfterRefresh
testcase.system-out: >> [Test 4] Session persistence after page refresh PASS: Session persisted across page refresh.

testcase.name: testProtectedRouteRedirectsToLoginAfterLogout

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //*[self::button or self::a][contains(translate(text(),'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ','abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'),'logout') or contains(translate(text(),'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ','abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'),'log out') or contains(translate(text(),'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ','abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'),'sign out')] (tried for 12 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '26.2', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: /var/folders/dd/lh0x43092pq...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53401}, goog:processID: 68702, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53401/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 1eb2d7efe0ad3149dc752f5e39d50c85

testcase.system-out: >> [Test 5] Direct /dashboard access after logout → redirect to login

testcase.name: testDirectUrlAccessWithoutLoginRedirectsToLogin

failure.message: Without any session, /dashboard should redirect to login. ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Without any session, /dashboard should redirect to login. ==> expected: <true> but was: <false> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTrue.failNotTrue(AssertTrue.java:63) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTrue.assertTrue(AssertTrue.java:36) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue(Assertions.java:214) at com.test.TestLoginBehaviour.testDirectUrlAccessWithoutLoginRedirectsToLogin(TestLoginBehaviour.java:362) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)
testcase.system-out: >> [Test 6] Cold-start direct URL access → redirect to login

testcase.name: testInvalidPasswordShowsErrorAndStaysOnLogin
testcase.system-out: >> [Test 7] Invalid password → error shown, no redirect Error message: 'Incorrect password. Please try again.' PASS: Invalid password correctly rejected.

testcase.name: testNonExistentUsernameShowsErrorAndSwitchesToSignUp

failure.message: Should show an error for an unknown username. ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Should show an error for an unknown username. ==> expected: <false> but was: <true> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertFalse.failNotFalse(AssertFalse.java:63) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertFalse.assertFalse(AssertFalse.java:36) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse(Assertions.java:239) at com.test.TestLoginBehaviour.testNonExistentUsernameShowsErrorAndSwitchesToSignUp(TestLoginBehaviour.java:419) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)
testcase.system-out: >> [Test 8] Non-existent username → error + auto-switch to sign-up Immediate error: ''

testcase.name: testEnterKeySubmitsLoginForm
testcase.system-out: >> [Test 9] Enter key submits login form Pressing Enter on password field... PASS: Enter key triggered login successfully.

testcase.name: testBrowserBackButtonAfterLogoutStaysOnLogin

testcase.system-out: >> [Test 10] Browser back button after logout → stays on login

testcase.name: testDuplicateUsernameOnSignUpShowsError
testcase.system-out: >> [Test 11] Duplicate username on sign-up → error shown Error message: 'Username already taken. Please log in instead.' PASS: Duplicate username correctly rejected.

testcase.name: testShortPasswordOnSignUpShowsError
testcase.system-out: >> [Test 12] Short password on sign-up → error shown Error message: 'Password must be at least 4 characters.' PASS: Short password correctly rejected.
